Organization 
11 = Health home or medical home 
12 = Integrated care for dual eligible 
13 = Other 
Null/missing = unknown/missing 

COMMENT: This field is derived from the MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD using the following logic: 
1 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 01, 04, 17 
2 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 02, 03 
3 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 05, 06 
4 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 07, 19 
5 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 08, 09, 10, 11, 
12, 13 
6 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 14 
 7 if MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD equals 15 
8 if
